title: Help: Unable to disconnect connected Outlook account in Emails & Activities

posts.author: MGoodwin (Melissa Goodwin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I connected my Microsoft Outlook account to a board via the Emails & Activities widget, but would like to disconnect it and can’t figure out how.

I found the instructions provided at this page, but the instructions are not helpful. Outlook is not set up in my account as an Integration, and I cannot find my way to the page with the trash can icon to disconnect my email connection.
